qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unrestricted env function in templates middleware exposes all process environment variables
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns the templates middleware (tplcontext.go:265) and an unrestricted env function, which is a different component and root cause from the advisory-described MatchHost case-sensitivity bug in matchers.go. Same repository but different vulnerable function, different security check failure, and different vulnerability class (SSTI/info disclosure vs. CWE-178 case sensitivity bypass).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory describes a case-sensitivity bug in Caddy's MatchHost matcher (modules/caddyhttp/matchers.go) where large host lists (>100 entries) trigger a case-sensitive binary search fast path instead of the documented case-insensitive strings.EqualFold comparison. The only qualifying finding 'ssti-env-information-disclosure' targets a different Caddy component (templates middleware tplcontext.go) with a different root cause (unrestricted env function).
evidence: Advisory vulnerable code: modules/caddyhttp/matchers.go, MatchHost.MatchWithError, MatchHost.large() helper, case-sensitive binary search path.
ssti-env-information-disclosure vulnerable code: modules/caddyhttp/templates/tplcontext.go:265-267, funcEnv calls os.Getenv without restriction.
No finding references MatchHost, the large-list fast path, case-sensitive comparison, or strings.EqualFold.
